name: Werewolf Woman TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation)
(Suggested by Ceathefox!)
You know what's really annoying? Transforming into a big, buff and busty werewolf lady every full moon, that's what!
It always seems to happen sooner than you expect, too. So many torn up clothes...
What's going to happen this time?

(Note: Thank you for all your comments! Suggestions are more of a special occasion type of thing, if I'm particularly feeling a certain idea. But I do appreciate all the positive feedback!)
creator: Orbital_Lithium
